name: Input
description: A text input field for capturing single-line user input.

props.name: inputId
props.description: Forwarded `id` applied to the native `<input>` element. Allows external `<label for="...">` to work.

props.name: size
props.description: Input size controlling padding, font size, and icon sizing.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name, used in form submissions.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Maximum character count. When set, enforces length via the native `maxlength` attribute.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the input as invalid with error border styling.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Make the input read-only (focusable but not editable).

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the input as required for form validation.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear button when the input has a value.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading spinner in place of the trailing icon.

slots.name: addon-left
slots.description: Attached text/element flush to the left edge (e.g. "https://").

slots.name: addon-right
slots.description: Attached text/element flush to the right edge (e.g. ".com").

slots.name: icon-left
slots.description: Leading icon element inside the input.

slots.name: icon-right
slots.description: Trailing icon element inside the input.

events.name: kb-input
events.description: Value changed on input. Detail: `{ value: string }`.

events.name: kb-change
events.description: Value committed on change. Detail: `{ value: string }`.
